name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '

---

## Description
A clear description of the feature or improvement.

## Problem It Solves
What problem or limitation does this address?

## Proposed Solution
How should this feature work?

## Alternative Approaches
Have you considered other ways to achieve this?

## Additional Context
Any other information or context.
